quotes.text: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Three things cannot be long hidden: the sun, the moon, and the truth.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: What we think, we become.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: In the end, only three things matter: how much you loved, how gently you lived, and how gracefully you let go of things not meant for you.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Health is the greatest gift, contentment the greatest wealth, faithfulness the best relationship.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Every morning we are born again. What we do today is what matters most.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Holding on to anger is like grasping a hot coal with the intent of throwing it at someone else; you are the one who gets burned.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: You yourself, as much as anybody in the entire universe, deserve your love and affection.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Doubt everything. Find your own light.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Nothing is permanent.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: If you light a lamp for somebody, it will also brighten your path.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: An idea that is developed and put into action is more important than an idea that exists only as an idea.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: No one saves us but ourselves. No one can and no one may. We ourselves must walk the path.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Better than a thousand hollow words, is one word that brings peace.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: The trouble is, you think you have time.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: If anything is worth doing, do it with all your heart.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Radiate boundless love towards the entire world — above, below, and across — unhindered, without ill will, without enmity.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: A jug fills drop by drop.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: There is no path to happiness: happiness is the path.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Your work is to discover your world and then with all your heart give yourself to it.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Just as a snake sheds its skin, we must shed our past over and over again.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Silence the angry man with love. Silence the ill-natured man with kindness. Silence the miser with generosity. Silence the liar with truth.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Pain is certain, suffering is optional.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: With our thoughts, we make the world.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: To understand everything is to forgive everything.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: If we could see the miracle of a single flower clearly, our whole life would change.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: The root of suffering is attachment.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: There is no fear for one whose mind is not filled with desires.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: True love is born from understanding.
quotes.author: Buddha
